text.title: QA Prioritization Rubric Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the rubric artefact this methodology produces. Validator in scripts/validate-qa-prioritization-rubric.py enforces required keys, enum bounds, and pattern constraints.

section.title: Schema

example.note: All required keys present; enums and patterns satisfied.
Forbidden traits: tier outside {S0..S3}; missing blast_radius/sla; triage decisions without anchor_rule_id.
